Non-Binding Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Investment in Bronzewattle Technologies Pty Ltd by Harbourline Capital Partners Pty Ltd (Australia)
Parties: Company—Bronzewattle Technologies Pty Ltd (ABN 00 123 456 789 – invalid), Registered Office: Level 15, 77 Harbour Arcade, Sydney NSW 2000; Investor—Harbourline Capital Partners Pty Ltd (ACN 123 456 788 – invalid), Principal Office: Level 8, 9 Mint Lane, Melbourne VIC 3000.
Jurisdiction and listing context: Governed by Australian law; intended to comply with APX Listing Rules and AICA regulatory guidance (fictional exchange/regulator reflecting Australian practice).
Transaction overview: Subscription for unsecured convertible notes and a strategic cooperation option; consideration, coupon, and conversion price to be agreed and released via a public market announcement before execution of binding documents.
Conditions precedent: Board approvals of both parties, any AICA relief (if required), APX waiver (if any), and receipt of an independent expert’s report consistent with the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth).
Funding and escrow: Investor funds to be deposited to Company escrow at First Interior Bank (BSB 000-000; Account 12345678 – placeholder only) pending satisfaction of conditions; no trust or fiduciary relationship is created by this term sheet.
Disclosure and MNPI: The parties confirm this summary reflects already-announced intentions and does not contain information that would reasonably be expected to have a material effect on financial products.
No shop/standstill: Non-binding moral commitment only; the Company may continue to explore alternatives, including a pro-rata placement to existing holders on APX.
Key undertakings: Use of proceeds for Australian R&D grant co-funding; appointment of a non-executive observer nominated by the Investor (role-only title, no personal details included herein).
Company identifiers: ABN 00 000 000 000 and ACN 000 000 000 shown in form fields are placeholders and may not pass checksum validation; do not rely on them for any filing.
Contact and notices: Company—transactions@bronzewattle.com.au; Investor—governance@harbourline.com.au; AUREG Public Infoline 1300 555 014 (for general regulatory guidance only).
Form labels for execution (placeholders): Name: [Authorised Signatory], Title: [Company Secretary], Date: [DD/MM/YYYY], Address: [Level/Floor, Street, Suburb, Postcode].
Identity verification for execution (one-off): Authorised Signatory (Passport No: XN1234567) will be verified via the Company’s third-party KYC portal; no copies will be retained in this term sheet.
Regulatory and compliance: Any binding terms will be documented in definitive agreements compliant with AICA Market Conduct Rules and APX Listing Rules; nothing herein constitutes financial product advice.
Governing provisions: This document is indicative only, does not create a binding obligation, and is prepared for discussion purposes with professional advisers and existing stakeholders.
